channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cheap stuff that doesn’t suck, take 3
item.description: From fancy OLED TVs to robot vacuums with arms, we tend to cover a lot of cool stuff here at The Verge that, unfortunately, often costs as much as a month’s rent (or more). But with the ongoing tariff situation in the US and a global memory shortage pushing up the cost of, well, everything, we’re well aware that not […]

item.title: Cette barre de son JBL 5.0 compatible Dolby Atmos et DTS Virtual:X était déjà abordable, mais elle l’est encore plus avec cette remise de 38 %
item.description: Lancée l'an dernier avec quatre autres références, la JBL Bar 300MK2 est une barre de son d'entrée de gamme capable de simuler un son surround 3D pour rendre les soirées cinéma plus agréables. Actuellement, Amazon la propose à 248,99 euros au lieu de 399,99 euros.

item.title: 'No onboard pilot needed': Massive 2-ton VTOL “mega drone” just hauled fresh tea leaves over 75 miles autonomously
item.description: Massive 2-ton autonomous cargo drone flies 75 miles across mountains carrying fresh tea without an onboard pilot.

item.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
item.description: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.

item.title: Dead as Disco is easily one of the best indie games I’ve ever played — and after 20 hours of demo, it beats the ‘brilliant’ Hi-Fi Rush in one major way
item.description: Dead as Disco is an incredibly promising beat 'em up game, and after 20 hours of playtime in the demo, I'm convinced it'll be an instant hit.

item.title: J’ai testé la Polar Street X : une montre de trail urbain taillée ni pour l’aventure, ni pour la ville
item.description: Avec la Polar Street X, le constructeur finlandais souhaite séduire les coureurs sur route qui veulent partir à l'aventure en ville. Mais au-delà de la promesse marketing, est-ce que la montre de sport suit ? C'est ce qu'on va voir dans ce test complet.

item.title: Sorry Apple, the iPhone 17e is slick but the OnePlus 15R is a bigger bargain
item.description: The iPhone 17e is Apple's most compelling mid-range phone yet, but it's still leagues behind Android rivals like the OnePlus 15R.

item.title: Score $200 off this pre-built gaming PC with an RTX 5060 and 32GB of DDR5 RAM at Best Buy
item.description: It's a great price for a mid-range desktop for gaming at 1080p
